description: A manager needs to perform the end-of-day closing procedures, including cash reconciliation.

nodes.task_description: Run the end-of-day process on each POS terminal.

expected_outcome.value: Each POS terminal is closed for the day, and sales reports are generated.

nodes.task_description: Count the cash from each drawer and compare it to the POS sales report.

expected_outcome.value: The manager counts the cash and enters the totals into the reconciliation tool.

nodes.task_description: Investigate any variance, prepare the bank deposit, and finalize the closing report.

expected_outcome.value: All cash is accounted for, the deposit is prepared, and the store is officially closed for the day.
